action_description: Separate material into parts by applying a sharp edge across its surface.
physics: shearing force and stress concentration along a thin edge
affordance: sharp, rigid edge capable of sustaining high local stress

action_description: Penetrate a surface using a concentrated point of force.
physics: stress concentration at a sharp tip enabling material failure

action_description: Fracture or destroy structural integrity through applied force.
physics: impact loading and stress accumulation exceeding material strength
affordance: hard or heavy object capable of delivering force

action_description: Apply force to draw an object closer or move it along a direction.
physics: tension force and directional force transfer

action_description: Move an object by rotational contact with a supporting surface.
physics: rotational motion with reduced sliding friction

action_description: Transport an object while maintaining balance and control.
physics: load support, center-of-mass stabilization, and frictional grip
affordance: handle-like or stable structure capable of supporting weight

action_description: Extend interaction distance to access distant objects.
physics: lever extension and force transmission over length

action_description: Apply compressive force onto a surface or object.
physics: normal force application and localized pressure
affordance: rigid contact surface capable of transmitting force

action_description: Strike an object to drive, deform, or embed it.
physics: momentum transfer and impulsive impact force

action_description: Collect and transfer loose material or liquid.
physics: containment through concavity and volume support

action_description: Move an object rapidly back and forth to induce motion effects.
Separate particles from a mixture based on size or permeability.
physics: size exclusion and flow through porous medium

action_description: Remove material from a surface through sliding contact.
physics: frictional shear force along a rigid edge
affordance: flat or slightly angled rigid edge

action_description: Gather scattered material across a surface toward a direction.
physics: distributed force transfer across surface contact

action_description: Stabilize or immobilize an object using localized force.
affordance: small rigid contact area capable of applying pressure

action_description: Prevent motion or restrict access by obstructing a path.
affordance: rigid and stable object with sufficient size

action_description: Increase connection firmness by applying rotational or compressive force.
Reduce constraint or release a connection by reversing applied torque or force.
